title: 23.5'' x 35.5'' Round Glass Cocktail Table with Chrome Base
features: Install a leading-edge look to your event venue when you purchase our 23.5'' round glass cocktail table.
Standing at 35.5'' tall, this cocktail table is the perfect height for your guests to rest their drinks or converse around your eye popping displays that make your event venue memorable.
Other features include a plastic base ring that protects scratching of your prestine floors and an easy to clean glass top with chrome base.
